title: Sudhakar Sutar: FinWise Smart Financial Advisor
paragraphs: Sudhakar Sutar is a Pune-based builder progressing through Stellar Journey to Mastery with strong consistency. His validation timeline is clear and impressive: Level 4 completed in February, Level 5 validated in March, and Level 6 validated on 6 April.

His project is FinWise, a smart financial advisor designed to give users practical AI-backed guidance. The core idea is to make financial decisions less overwhelming for regular users by turning advice into actionable, understandable steps.

A key feature in FinWise is the piggy bank module. Users deposit money and maintain a streak, which adds a behavioral layer to saving instead of relying only on one-time motivation. This makes progress visible and habit-driven over time.

Sudhakar's approach reflects a product builder mindset: identify a relatable daily problem, ship a focused solution, and keep improving through real user-oriented features. Alongside building, he is open to collaboration and community growth through his public profiles.
At first, he mentioned that he did not recognize me, but after that the conversation stayed clear and straightforward for drafting this blog.
